current_scope_findings.title: Package-based test-case file has no Source Row Inventory
current_scope_findings.details: Writer output must inventory every source row in the confirmed scope before normalization, so a source row cannot silently disappear from the ledger and TC coverage.
current_scope_findings.recommended_action: Add `## Source Row Inventory` with source_row_id, package_id, field_or_action, source_ref, requirement_codes, in_scope and mapped_atom_or_gap.

current_scope_findings.title: Package-based test-case file has no Writer Quality Gate
current_scope_findings.details: Package-based writer output must self-reject semantic compression, merged TC, broad GSR ranges and unobservable internal behavior before it is sent to reviewer.
current_scope_findings.recommended_action: Add `## Writer Quality Gate` with the canonical gate items and block failed packages before ready-for-review.

current_scope_findings.title: Test-case file has no Test-design applicability matrix
current_scope_findings.details: Canonical initial drafts should explicitly record which coverage dimensions apply, do not apply, or remain unclear.
current_scope_findings.recommended_action: Add a Test-design Applicability Matrix before review handoff.
